subcodes.first_line: All things have testified to the grandeur of God's Manifestation, yet His servants remain heedless of His Revelation and are devoted to idols [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع اشیا شهادت داده اند بر عظمت ظهور الله ولکن عباد از ظهور غافل و باصنام
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
